title: Polymarket post-spike decisions: daily FOMC archive cadence + CEO call on any strategy use
why: B0170 verdict: lead-lag NULL after BH on the full 132-cell grid (no Polymarket series leads daily returns at 1-5d); event study found ONE suggestive cell — XAUUSD pre-FOMC drift -> post-meeting 2d return sign agreement 79% (n=14, binomial p=0.029 one-sided, x4 assets Bonferroni 0.116 — NOT family-wise significant). Two follow-ups remain: (a) OPERATIONAL: run `uv run python scripts/ingest_polymarket.py --config configs/polymarket.yaml` once daily through Jun 18 so the live Jun-16/17 FOMC market's fine (1h) history is archived before it resolves and degrades to 12h fidelity; (b) CEO-RESERVED: whether the XAU/FOMC drift observation justifies any use at all (tier2 feature is NOT viable — history starts 2024-05, far short of the multi-year walk-forward; a live event-risk gate/overlay touches the frozen-strategy path, freeze Jun 21 22:00 BST).
value_rationale: M: the archive step is nearly free and time-bound (FOMC Jun 16-17 in prep week); the strategy decision is explicitly CEO-reserved and likely a NO given n=14 / Bonferroni 0.116.
scope: Daily ingest run Jun 13-18 (one command/day; no daemon)
CEO decision memo: use/no-use of pm_fomc_* before the Jun 21 freeze
out_of_scope: Any implementation of a live gate/overlay or tier2 wiring before the CEO decides; websocket streaming; new series beyond config edits.

history.reason: Spawned from B0170 out_of_scope on spike completion.

Polymarket closed as a research line by CEO 2026-06-12 after three honest negatives: B0170 (direction null/reverse-causal), B0174 kill-test (implied vol real but not incremental over historical), B0174 post-hoc (no tail/forward-looking sizing edge). The Jun-17 XAU forward test was non-confirmatory by construction (n=14->15, Bonferroni ~0.1) so cancelling loses no power; prediction never stamped. Daily archive cadence stopped. Spec preserved as record. Reusable infra (ingest, extractor, 35 tests) remains for any future question.
chore(B0172): close Polymarket research line â€” discard forward test, stop archive cadence

REOPENED by CEO 2026-06-12: the Polymarket closure was too broad. B0172 reactivated in full — (a) daily archive cadence through Jun 18 (capture the live Jun-16/17 FOMC market at 1h before it resolves to 12h), and (b) the pre-registered XAU forward test (stamp prediction Mon Jun-15 after 23:59 UTC, readout Fri Jun-19), treated as an OOS discipline exercise (not a statistical validation: n=14->15, Bonferroni ~0.1). B0170/B0174 remain done (alpha/vol lines closed); only this lightweight forward observation + archive cadence stay live.
chore(B0172): reopen â€” closure was too broad; keep XAU forward test + archive cadence
chore(backlog): record commit-trail hooks for the Polymarket B-IDs
